reviews.review_description: It's one of the ugliest Quest apps I've ever seen, and on top of that, one of the worst running ones. It feels like an incomplete demo that constantly stutters and runs at a horrible framerate. It took about 10 minutes to finally get through about 100 pages of ToS that you're required to scroll through just to start the app, and then I was met with another 5 minute wait to download 60mb to actually start it. Once you're in, it's basically just a poor attempt by the sponsors of the Expo to advertise while you're forced to download something new every 2 minutes. Don't waste your time with this pile of garbage. Zero effort was put into it.

reviews.review_title: Can't go past the terms and conditions
reviews.review_description: There is a glitch in the initial Agreement screen where even if you scroll through the agreement contract you can't press the agree button. It even says there is a problem on meta quest. Waiting for a remedy or fix!
